description:
Same model. Two access tiers. ⚡ One is public. One requires vetting. 🔒
Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 share the same underlying architecture — but only one of them is available to developers on the standard API. Here's why Anthropic split the release and what it means for the future of AI access.

The June 9, 2026 announcement introduced a new pattern for frontier model distribution: a publicly available version with safety classifiers, and a restricted version for vetted organizations only.

🎯 What you'll learn

- What Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5 are and how they differ
- Why Anthropic released two versions of the same model on the same day
- What Project Glasswing is and how organizations apply for access
- How Fable 5 handles high-risk requests (cybersecurity, biology, chemistry)
- What the 1 million token context window and 128k output limit enable
- How to start building with Fable 5 using the Anthropic API
- What the dual-track release signals for the broader AI industry


🔗 Links
- Anthropic announcement: https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-fable-5-mythos-5
- Project Glasswing: https://www.anthropic.com/glasswing
- Claude models overview: https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/about-claude/models/overview
- Claude pricing: https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/about-claude/pricing
- API release notes: https://docs.anthropic.com/en/release-notes/api

Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 represent a genuine shift in how Anthropic approaches frontier model distribution. Rather than a single public release, the Claude Fable 5 Mythos 5 launch introduces explicit trust tiers — same capability base, different access conditions. For developers, Fable 5 delivers strong agentic coding and long-context reasoning through the standard API. For vetted organizations, the Anthropic dual model release unlocks Project Glasswing and Mythos 5's expanded cybersecurity capabilities. If you're building on Claude, this is the release that sets the pattern going forward.

#Anthropic #ClaudeFable5 #AINews
#ClaudeMythos5 #Anthropic #AISafety #ProjectGlasswing
#Shorts
fulltitle: Claude Fable 5 vs Mythos 5 — The Model You Can't Use #Shorts
